items.headline_en: DeepSeek-V4 Enters Hugging Face 'Hot' Feed, Highlighting Million-Token Context for Agents
items.summary_en: DeepSeek-V4, a model supporting a one-million-token context window, has appeared in the Hot articles section of the Hugging Face community blog.
